title: Recall Potions
description:
Outdated, please download the mod Potions & Such instead.

Potions that teleport you to your spawnpoint.
body:
## This mod is discontinued. The features in this mod are included in my newer mod which can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/potions-and-such)

A simple mod that adds a new potion to the game: The Recall Potion.

Recall potions are crafted by brewing an ender pearl into an awkward potion. This potion grants the Recall effect for 15 seconds, which teleports you to your spawnpoint when it runs out.
![Recall effect in the inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96ab5a1783d275f20c0304db81bfdc1076514831.png)

There are 2 other variations of the potion: Quick, which is made with glowstone dust and a Recall Potion, and long, which is made with redstone dust and a Recall Potion. Quick teleports you after 4 seconds while long teleports you after 60 seconds.
